request_payload.exposure_text: As we face growing threats from both foreign and domestic sources, it's clear that our law enforcement needs stronger tools to keep us safe. Just last month in [Redacted County], coordinated protests turned violent when activists blocked emergency response routes. Local police were unable to act decisively because of outdated legal constraints. We can't afford to wait for another crisis. It's time to empower our domestic security agencies with the authorities they need to preempt threats before they escalate. Our safety shouldn't be held hostage by bureaucratic delays or political correctness. #NationalSecurityFirst #LawAndOrder
